identity_desc: Useful information to personalize your space and messages.
organisation_hint: Used to customize auto-messages in your groups.
preferences_desc: Control alerts and useful dashboard signals.
sound_notifications_text: Play a sound on important events.
notification_center_text: View subscription reminders and system alerts.
timezone_hint: Scheduled messages will respect this timezone.
security_desc: Clerk manages identity and sensitive access.
help_support_text: Need help with a plan or a group.
delete_dialog_desc: This action is irreversible. All your WhatsApp sessions, configured groups and history will be permanently deleted.
delete_dialog_confirm: To confirm, type your email address:
toast_delete_info: Deletion request received. Final processing needs to be wired server-side.
